series_metadata.series_description: Documents review or modification of a license, permit, certification, or registration through administrative hearing process. Records include, but are not limited to, notice of opportunity for hearing, request for hearing, scheduling information, continuances, file sent by client on respondent (gathered during investigative of respondent), exhibits, correspondence, attorney work product, report and recommendation from hearing officer, and final adjudication order.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from case closing. ; Paper: from case closing, unless scanned and saved electronically
